title: Odyssey, Book 4: At the Court of Menelaus
description: Book 4 of Homer's Odyssey: At the Court of Menelaus.
introduction: Book 4 of the Odyssey: At the Court of Menelaus. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.text: They reached the hollow vale of Lacedaemon. Menelaus and Helen welcomed Telemachus. Helen told of how Odysseus had entered Troy disguised as a beggar. Menelaus told of wrestling the Old Man of the Sea, Proteus, who revealed that Odysseus was alive, trapped on Calypso's island. Meanwhile in Ithaca, the suitors planned to ambush Telemachus on his return.
